heading: Today
text: Becoming partly sunny, quite mild. A spotty afternoon shower north.

heading: Monday Night
text: A rising chance of showers, some freezing rain far north.

heading: Tuesday
text: Showers, isolated freezing rain far north, becoming a cold rain north, mild rain south.

heading: Wednesday
text: Morning rain, isolated freezing rain far north, then decreasing before noon.
temperature: 30s to low 40s north of Rt. 2, 50s to mid 60s south.
